review_text: If you like ||No friendly welcome while checking in|Traffic noises day and night from the highway |20 m from your Cabin a building side with Truck and machine noises from 7am till late arvo.|A dirty Cabin|A door which rattles loud while opening and closing |If you shower longer as 2 minutes no warm water anymore|Tiny Ants around sink|Uncomfortable bed, firm mattress ( personal choice ) |Than feel free to book ||Good points |Entry and exit to park only via code, so it’s secure |New floor in cabin|New A/C but the old one still sits underneath, very dodgy |Crisp linen |Shopping centre 15 min walk ||I will never return ….

THIS IS THE PARK FOR YOU, IF YOU:

Enjoy the loud music and the barking dogs of neighbouring homes.
Enjoy the noise of motorcycle hoons using the main road in front of the park as an evening road racing track several times a week.
Enjoy the sight of ramshackled and messy permanent sites.
Want a ridiculously annoying narrow one way road circuit.
Want an ensuite site that never gets serviced, with a toilet that needs 2-3 flushes to clear, for $400 a week?
Have no ability to have a park issue dealt with after hours, lest you be labelled an annoyance for doing so and directed to leave.
Have complaints about a permanent guest ignored, as they'd never been a complaint before! As apparently they can do what they like.
Want fabricated accusations made in a effort to justify removing someone from the park.
Want a park manager that is a little unpredictable.

THEN BEST OF LUCK!

Never Again!
Fully booked so must be reasonable

Holiday Park was incredible Kids had a blast in the pool and on the slides. Great if you were just passing through on the highway.

Great facilities, if you’re camping
This place is fantastic great for kids and big kids we  ome here all thr time the staff are very friendly and helpful 😀 👍

Great spot for a motel-style overnight stop. It’s right on the national highway, at the crossroads of the A1 and A6, making it a breeze to pull in and out of during a long trip.
Shops are right across the road, so you don't have to navigate further into town

"Far out, what an absolute cracker of a stay! Took the young lass up to Townsville and copped a motel room at Discovery—best decision ever. I had a comfy double and she was stoked as with the bunk beds. Having our own ensuite was a total lifesaver, meant no trekking across the park for a Wee in the middle of the night! The air-con was cranking, which was a bloody godsend in that North QLD heat. Too easy, we’ll be back for another crack for sure!"
Major shopping centre 1 min drive. Petrol station 250m away
stay in the cabin room and can’t even use the wifi for a week. the reception lady not helping at all. diabolical

Soooo old and dirty felt like a Backpackers accommodation shame that they don't spend the effort on cabins as much as they do on yard etc worst place ever stayed at could do with total clean paint n update on appliances shower was absolutely disgusting  the minimum Cleans done.
Staff were lovely and so accommodating. Will definitely be back again soon!

We had a lovely 2 night stay in a cabin last weekend. The service we received from the staff  was fabulous. They were so accommodating with allowing our ageing golden retriever to stay and a late check-out to work around our sons sport tournament. The cabin was neat, tidy and clean and was close to the sports stadium. We both slept well and didn't hear any noise from the road. We did lots of walks around the park with our dog and found it well maintained, quiet and friendly. Would definitely stay here again.
Clean tidy rooms. Handy to where I needed to be.

I had a rooms, not a cabin. The rooms are plain and basic, but the bed and pillows are amazing.
Pools and amenities great as well.

My husband was in Townsville for a work trip. He became ill on the last day. Checkout was at 10am, Flight was at 3pm. Reception were very lovely and allowed him to check out late to accommodate for his illness and flight time.

Awful campsite - if I could do 0 stars I would!!
We stayed here for 2 nights after having previously stayed at multiple discovery parks and really liking them but this place gives discovery parks a bad name and really lets the Big4 chain down.
As soon as you first drive in you feel deeply uncomfortable and unsafe due to the permanent residents staring at you and just generally being intimidating and unfriendly. The main issue with this is that a lot of them seem to work there so it doesn’t feel safe to report any of their behaviour. The girl at reception when I checked in on Friday was lovely and helpful but as soon as reception closes it’s a bit of a free for all with swarms of children running wild and the locals getting drunk, screaming and creating a hostile environment.
When we first arrived there was a locals car in our spot so reception asked them to move it which he begrudgingly did but then later on that night while we were at our van he came up to us pissed drunk, slurring his words and no trousers on saying we took his car parking spot and made us very uncomfortable.
The bathrooms were disgusting with an infestation of bugs (far more than a usual campsite) there were spiders, ants, flies, moths, cockroaches and others I couldn’t even identity, the place was FILTHY. Each morning there were 100’s of dead flies around all the sinks etc. There was no hot or even mildly warm water until our second evening, before that it was ice cold showers.
I wouldn’t be one to leave bad reviews but this place is disgusting and more importantly very unsafe and I wouldn’t want anyone to stay there and be in a similar position. Both evenings we went across to Fairfield just to avoid being around the campsite, that’s how bad it was. Judging by the rest of the reviews management just seem to spit out the same generic response to all bad reviews but even if this stops one person from booking here I’d be happy.

I called yesterday to book into Discovery Parks – Townsville and spoke with a lovely young lady named Naomi. She was incredibly friendly, polite, and so efficient. She made the whole process quick and easy, and it was such a pleasure dealing with someone so helpful. Customer service like hers really makes a difference—thank you, Naomi!

Great location, there is a road but we didn’t hear it. The kids area was great, the pool was amazing and relaxing. I have read a review about noise, however if you are already heightened by your own home life anything beyond that is going to be amplified into someone else’s problem. All the staff were super friendly, even the pool man contracted to do the pool was friendly and chatty. No dogs off lead, no hooning, no nuisance permanent people making me feel uncomfortable. The built in lotions, shampoo etc were good quality and very much appreciated. Loads of storage in our room and the fridge had ample space for our needs. We will be back Discovery.
Very good experience, Amanda I think her name was on reception really helped and and was super nice

My true rating for this place is 10/10. Kelly and the ladies at reception are so beautiful and welcoming. Love the nails Kelly💅🏻☺️ so welcoming and accommodating to our group of 12 people. We flew in from Sydney and it was our first time our family have been to Townsville and we’re so glad this was the 1st place we stayed at. Now this will be the ONLY place we will stay at when we travel to Townsville. Thank you a million times over. The pool area and water slides were fantastic for the kids and us adults lol. Most of us stayed in the Motel rooms and were very impressed with how spacious they were. We’ve told all our family members about DPT and we will all definitely be coming back soon.
Great for families. Highly recommended

Good customer service and provided better services for all the requests.

Naomi was the best and she addressed all our concerns with great care and support 🙂

This is, without a doubt, the worst caravan park we have ever stayed at, and after travelling Australia for years and staying in countless parks, that should tell you everything.

The noise from the road is relentless—sirens, traffic, constant disruption day and night. Sleeping properly was impossible.

The staff and management were rude, dismissive, and completely unhelpful from the moment issues were raised. The children’s facilities were run down and nowhere near the standard advertised.

A large number of long-term residents live here, creating an unsettling environment for anyone actually on holiday. During our stay we encountered late-night yelling, aggressive behaviour, and ongoing disturbances that made the park feel unsafe and created an atmosphere no family should have to put up with while paying for accommodation.

Dog control was serious problem. Several dogs were off-lead despite clearly posted rules. My own dogs were attacked twice, and when I reported it I was met with condescension and zero action from management. The lack of responsibility was infuriating.

Vehicles frequently sped through the park far beyond the 5 km/h limit, including in areas where children were present. Night-time hooning—wheel spins, excessive revving etc —occurred regularly. Complaints achieved nothing, and staff showed no willingness to take responsibility, responding in ways that were dismissive and at times outright rude.

When it became clear we needed to leave, the park refused to provide a refund. I rarely write reviews, but this place was genuinely horrendous from start to finish. I hope this spares others from the same disappointment and frustration.

Reception staff were good to deal with, yard staff done a good job, clean also, but the permanent residents not so easy to deal with, l was mistaken and now realise the park is actually run by the permanents, and they get to decide who does what or not, won't be back, think some places need to rename " the term tourist park" is very loosely used they days, and obvious 28 day stay Max is only for some. Had a caravan site.
Great place to stay. Clean. Great for kids very nice pool and waterpark!
Great staff, location n value

Be so careful !!!!!!!!stayed here told staff and emailed them aswell-  that Im pretty sure someone was trying to get into my room in middle of night can you please check CCTV - still have not received a response apology nothing -  that was over 1 month ago so be very very careful if you chose to say here!

Only stayed over night but was amazed by how clean, spacious and comfortable our cabin was. The park is situated by an Ampol which was so handy. The park is across the road from a brand new shopping centre. And to top it off, The front office staff Naomi and Samantha were incredibly welcoming. Well done to the managers Paige and Sharon.
We stayed in a wheelchair accessible room and thankfully the doors are really accessible unlike some other motels that the doors were too narrow…that would be even better if they can adapt dogs…

Park isn't horrible. But a lot of road noise, very pokey for van parks and felt like too many people lived there than visiting. We had a great site, but to get in and out, we had to remove some posts in the ground.|Laundry and amenities were all very clean.|Staff were friendly
Great location. Only 15 minutes from the CBD and ferry to Magnetic Island.
Laundry had multiple machines out of service, room had multiple broken items and well out dated, for 220 per night expect a little bit more.
Thank you Discovery park Townsville, great place to stay, handy to everything and the reception staff are top notch. Very friendly, very accommodating and extremely helpful.
Security Gates surround the Park people can only get access with accommodation keys and room number to punch into key pad at entrance of Gates

Receptionist was friendly and welcoming. That was the only positive. While I understand what you pay is what you get, we did have an affordable economy cabin for 1 night. It was the only accomodation left in Townsville for the Footy Game so it was nice to be accommodated for during a period of high occupancy. Upon check in we did overhear that they are fully booked as to why we didn’t come to the desk and report the issues. However I think despite what you are paying whether it’s a cheap rate or a high, standards should have been higher. It was clear the room wasn’t or was poorly inspected prior our check in. The aircon cover cover was hanging off and we were hit with a strong smell of mildew and mold. The sheets were covered in marks whilst I understand myself working in hotel industry, rejects are common in linen orders. It really made me question the way both sheets were marked and not replaced with a clean one. When I made the bed I discovered that the fleece blankets had multiple grubby marks and stains on them. The sheets were fine for 1 night.

However upon looking just casually around the room the walls were filthy and covered in stains. Something that would be very obvious to spot clean. The moldy aircon, marked sheets and dirty walls certainly made the cabin feel even more dirty and uncomfortable. The dated kitchen and other items are not an issue as we didn’t really care and understand. The air con made a noisy rattling sound all night, the mattresses did not have mattress protectors either. It was quite possibly the worst sleep I’ve ever had. I also suffer from an auto-immune disease and if I were staying more than 1 night I certainly would have to leave.

The public amenities were quite unkept and very dirty, whilst we also understand this is a public area and couldn’t not be cleaned every hour of every day. It felt dirty enough that I did not want to step back inside.

We thank the staff for their friendliness and being able to accomodate us and hope some changes in the cleanliness of cabin 12 can be made for future guests.

Can’t say we would return but would recommend booking a higher rate room for your stay.

We stayed in the deluxe 2 Brm cabin. The state of the cabin was dreadful. The floors were filthy. The shower was so mouldy, the grout was disgusting and someone else’s hair present. Hole in the bedroom wall, the windows and sills were so dirty and dusty thick with grime. The mop and bucket provided smelt putrid and the mop was broken and the bucket filthy. Room where the bunks were, the walls were absolutely filthy, grimy and stained. Stains from unknown substances remained all down the walls. The fan in the bathroom made a horrendous noise and the aircons didn’t work efficiently and rattled all night. Plus the pool had been drained. I expressed my concerns at a staff member upon leaving and all she said was have a good trip home. What a terrible place to stay.

Over the years we have had some hard times with hospital stays and called upon this motel ,the staff and facilities have been second to none ,called upon after hours never a problem at a time of need can not recommend a a business more i thank you more than you could ever imagine 13 out of ten stars to you
Amazing friendly staff

Ensuite caravan site the bathroom has no ventilation back of door mouldy unaware the swimming pool empty under repair the gate to the play area won't close properly there were only 2 working washing machines
Girls on the front desk are gems, looked after us the whole time we were in Townsville organising our work trips, great place to stay and will book again in the future!
Excellent experience from start to finish. Communication was prompt, and the shipping was incredibly fast. The product works perfectly, and I couldn’t be happier with my purchase.
Just so humbled

Zweckmäßig guter Campingplatz. Tolle Pool-Landschaft für die Kinder.

Durch die Lage direkt am Highway sehr laut. Die Laundry war während unseres Aufenthaltes leider außer Betrieb.
Mitarbeiter am Empfang sind sehr unfreundlich und nicht gerade hilfsbereit.

Racq booked 2 of us here for 2 nights.  Cabin 45 had mould covering the external wall and windows on the outside.  Cooktop looked like it was from the 70s, functional but this is 2025 and rates are 2025.  Tv sits on top of wardrobe just clearing ceiling.   Crockery and cutlery were clean however tiny meat ants appeared on sink and any packets of food within minutes.  Small bar fridge had a freezer which had ice consuming more space than was left for food.  The vertical blinds at the very old front galss sliding door were missing some of the vertical slats so you could see straight into the room at night.  The park laundry was locked closed with a sheet of galvanised tin and a note saying closed, staff advised had been that way for over a week and no idea when reopens.  The air conditioner was quite new and worked well.  The park is quite aged, the park borders 2 main roads, sitting behind a service station which you exit through.  I had no issues with staff but really, mould on external walls and windows!!!  $30 bottle of wet and forget at bunnings and 10 mins labour would offer customers a much better first impression.  I would not recommend.

We tried to book a powered site for 2 nights online ($77) but it wouldn't let us. So I called and they said they only had availability for 1 night, so we booked that - to be paid when we arrived. My partner went in and paid upon arrival and I found out later it was $45 for the night. We are G'day parks members too.

The next morning after I found out how much he had paid, I went to the front desk to question it. The ladies on reception were extremely rude, didn't offer a refund and proceeded to tell me that online is different to booking & paying through the park??????? I expressed that if someone had told me that, I would have simply booked the 1 night online. They were just completely dismissive of me and shrugged their shoulders.

In addition, we wanted to stay here to use the pool and splash park for our 2yo, however to our disappointment, when we arrived we found out that the pool is out of action. It would have been nice if someone had told us that upon booking.

Generally speaking, we've had a good experience with g'day parks, but the service at this particular park really lets them down and we would never recommend to anyone and we will never stay there again.
Just a good place to park my van
Very large site(38) very helpful staff Great pool
Affordable and well located park generous with tea coffee, toiletries and towels. Stayed there twice! Great air conditioning too for a caravan park.

I booked a powered sites and a motel room for friends we were travelling with. The powered ste was great but the motel had no hot water it ran out the night before but the guests weren't informed until they went to the office there was no apology the staff member was rude and unprofessional saying what would you want us to do knock on your door at 11pm to let you know. My friend said no but may be an email or text to say sorry and let them know where the park amenities were.So they could shower.There was no apology at all and when my friend went to leave the staff member said sarcastically Have a nice day....very rude

The park was clean and tidy. Our cabin was well stocked and clean. Management was super quick organising a new pump for the splash park that kids seemed to enjoy. Very well run place, great location too!
The ladies on the front desk were so lovely and helpful! Nice little park too. Thanks for giving me a very welcoming and comfortable stay ladies! Liz :)
Park was clean and tidy

Staff were kind enough to change us nearer the Amenities, as requested on my booking. Big electronic gates, highly secure Park. Female Amenities block needs a bit of maintenance done, toilet bowels x2 have all along the base area cracks, the light cover was lying on the floor from the outside light, I leaned it against the wall so that it doesn't break ( it was still after 2 days like that), the floors look old and worne ( that makes them look dirty) the sink area was worne and the taps when turned on and off moved around, the hand dryer was great. Shower  was strong and the temperature was good. Bathrooms were cleaned. Unfortunately there where cigarettebutts lying around on the grass and our site. Good water connection and power. Nice play area and the pool looked nice. Apart from the mentioned things we had a good stay.
Colin and Vi are viscious

How great is this place. Clean, tidy, gardens are well maintained. All staff are  very friendly and will go out of their way to help. Vi and Colin have made a lot of great changes that make this a great place to stay. Thumbs up from me.

Not impressed at all. Paid $199 for one night for the motel style room [room 6] and even tho the room was clean and tidy we weren't happy with the view right out of our door been laundry crates / trolleys full of dirty laundry. Down pipe was broken so when we got a shower of rain the water hit the coppers log in the garden and bounced back up onto the walkway out the front of our room. The walkway was in an undercover area. There was no door mat to wipe our feet so walking into the unit with wet dirty feet. The door retractor on the back of the door sprung a leak and dripping oil onto the floor in the doorway. The office was closed so i rang the after hours number and his attitude was not what i was expecting. Told me to report it to the office in the morning. That might have been ok for him but it was me having to clean it up a number of times over the next 3 hours until it ran out of oil, not wanting to slip over in it. I did ask him for a rag or something as i had nothing to wipe it up with and was told to use one of their towels, which i didn't i used toilet paper. BUT it was something that i shouldn't have had to do, he should have come to help or at least come to see what it was doing. The single bed was not made up properly. It just had a fitted sheet on it and the top sheet and blanket were just folded up and sat on the bed. For the price we paid we shouldn't have had to be making a bed, cleaning up oil for hours and looking at dirty laundry crates out our door or dodging rain water puddles on the walkway because a downpipe wasn't working. Yes i paid for the room when i rang and booked it and i wasn't happy with the price but it was convient for the hospital and never expected what we got for our money.
As far as caravan facilities go they always clean and well kept and the grounds are in good condition. I really like the locked gat policy to

Definitely will stay again! The staff were very friendly and helpful. Beautiful clean pool and slides the kids had so much fun.|Our room was nice and clean! Overall the park was well kept. Close to shops, supermarkets, restaurants and takeaways.
Makes it a bit hard for nomad’s to book in when fees apparently change daily and no discount if staying longer
Beautiful comfy bed and pillows.   Scrumptious
A very beautiful campsite. Due to severe weather, we had to stay one extra night, and the team generously offered it to us for free. THANK YOU VERY MUCH!
This is the best campground from Townsville for the price....

I recently stayed here and was extremely disappointed. The room was old and rundown, with a mouldy spot on the bed sheet that left me questioning the overall cleanliness. Spiderwebs were left hanging on the walls, showing a blatant disregard for maintenance. The shower had an insanely loud, outdated fan that sounded like an airplane about to take off—hardly the relaxing experience I expected. And to top it all off, despite the motel advertising Wi-Fi, there was absolutely no connection in the room. For international travelers who rely on strong internet, this is a major letdown. I wouldn’t recommend this motel to anyone seeking a comfortable and hassle-free stay.

Stayed here in January was a great place in general cleanliness could be improved  for example one of the blinds looked a bit average it either had some sort of mud on it or it was wearing and has to be replaced, And also the security screen door on the outside was broken and wouldn't lock or close properly apart from this it was a great stay and definitely will be back😃
Not safe. Gets robbed regularly. Cabins are not safe

In January to early February 2025, my son and I spent three weeks here. For half our stay we were in the Standard Access Cabin, and then we moved to the Deluxe Access Cabin for the remainder of our stay as the Standard was booked out. ||Being only a few minutes from Townsville University Hospital meant that we didn’t have far to travel each day, which was a big bonus.||It was lovely to be in a place which was advertised as accessible, and it was. We were pleasantly surprised. The fact that I was able to easily get around the cabin, meant that I could relax, and so could my son. It was also lovely to enjoy the beautiful well maintained surroundings and enjoy the bird life. ||I found that I enjoyed the Deluxe Cabin’s accessible kitchen as it was a dream to cook in as it really was accessible. I didn’t get a chance to take a picture, but it is as advertised.||Both Cabins had plenty of space for me to get around in my wheelchair. It was nice to stay in a place where the door handles and switches were accessible. ||What I liked about the Standard Access Cabin was that there were down lights above the queen bed, and a switch on each side of the bed, which was easily accessed from bed. This feature wasn’t in the Deluxe Access Cabin. This meant I had to ask my son to turn out the light, and then I had to read by torchlight. Not fun. ||The bedside table was at least 30cm from the bed. I’m short and found it difficult to reach the items on my bedside table, and there was no bedside light. ||Other than those minor inconveniences, I would suggest that management put in a ramp at Reception. If my son had not been able to drag my wheelchair over the step, or if I was in a power wheelchair, I wouldn’t have been able to enter Reception at all.||Naomi and Kellie, as well as the owners, Colin and Violet and other staff members, were super helpful during our stay. If we needed towels, or wanted to changes sheets more regularly than the usual weekly schedule, they brought towels and sheets when requested. ||If we return to Townsville for a holiday, I will definitely be staying here again.
جميل ورااائع ويمكنني الذهاب في اي وقت

We have been travelling around Australia for the last 2 months and on the whole so far all caravan parks we have stayed at have been bloody great UNTIL we got to Discovery Park Wulguru Townsville.
This park was absolutely disgusting and dirty from the start with the bins full of maggots and overflowing everywhere, lawns not mowed and worst of all days in a row toilets both male & female not clean with no toilet paper or seats broken, then out the front of the toilets dirty linen spilling onto the road with more garbage spilling out of bins for days. We went to have a bbq and although it’s the camper’s responsibility to keep them clean they were absolutely putrid.
I know it’s been raining but that’s no excuse for filth… Even the pool being locked at 4.30pm was a let down and when hubby finally went for a swim the pool floor was covered in black mould!!!
Sadly we would not recommend this caravan park to anyone!!!

We had a fantastic visit to Discovery Park in Townsville, and I can't recommend it enough! From the moment we arrived, the friendly and welcoming staff made us feel welcomed. Their enthusiasm and helpfulness truly set the tone for our day.

The highlight for our kids was definitely the swimming pool and slides! The kids couldn't get enough of the fun water features, and it was wonderful to see them laughing and splashing around. The pools were well maintained and offered the perfect mix of relaxation and excitement.

We appreciated the family-friendly environment, with plenty of shaded areas and seating for parents to relax while keeping an eye on the little ones. The park also had various other activities and amenities that kept everyone entertained throughout the day.

Overall, our experience at Discovery Park Townsville was memorable and enjoyable. It’s a perfect destination for families looking for a fun day out. We can't wait to return for another adventure!

The shower leaked and flooded The bathroom within seconds. It flooded into the kitchen. Had to use our dirty laundry of ours to soak it up alongside all the towels that were in the room. Called after hours for more towels to soak it up. Could not shower 2/3 nights we stayed. After hours staff  member was rude, tried to explain it was night time and our kids were in bed. We were desperate for a shower and wanted to try be quick but it wasn't worth it. Within seconds it flooded that bathroom into the cabin. They acted like they weren't aware but behind the door and on the edge of the wall is an water damage and breaking away. They've siliconed it in hopes to figure out a cause.

Extending on this. The Wall in the main bedroom on the right down the bottom in the middle of you push on it. It actually is damaged from water and is coming away from the architraves and is perishing.

The bathroom was really disgusting. The toilet was dirty and had poo marks on the bowl and the seat was still had marks all over it. I purchased some cleaner from Coles as no way would my kids or ourselves just use  that. Dust all over the architraves and public hair throughout the bathroom. Walls were disgustingly stained with splat marks all over it.

Bugs in the kettle, and moths in one of the one of our kids room. Ended up borrowing a cot from a friend who resides in Townsville to be safe. The bed base is supported by cardboard! Avoid cabin 33. Though the neighbour said the bathroom/ cabin was pretty bad too!

Would go back for the amenities, outside the cabin is beautiful and clean. Bathrooms at the pool area are spotless, the pool area is beautiful, pool is very well maintained- staff are there throughout the day, jumping pillow was a hit along with the park area.

I can't respond to your reply for some reason but here is a screen shot of declining your offer to upgrade as we wanted the cabin we booked.

Beautiful park, paradise for kids.|They have a waterpark, a nice swimming pool, playground |We stayed in a motel for 5 nights, unfortunately there wasn't a room service and the towels didn't dry well.|At night it was a bit noisy because the park is located at a busy highway.|The other thing the rubbish in the pool area. On the first day we arrived there was a bag of chips and it was still there after we left ( 6 days), also other rubbish water bottles, snacks...|Otherwise we loved the park and will be back 🙂

Advertise free wifi but don't tell you it's not available in the rooms! You need to change your advertising and stop misleading people
When I spoke to reception treatment was poor and would not do anything to help

Very, very disappointed with this place!  We noted that their website showed an office closing time of 6pm but when we arrived with our caravan to check-in at 5.30pm, the office was closed. Rang the emergency number and spoke with a person who was quite rude and unsympathetic to our plight. No offer or desire to help us out so we had no option but to back out of the driveway and look elsewhere. As Discovery members, not the sort of unco-operative, rude behaviour we have encountered on our nine months on the road. Not happy and very, very disappointed.

Needs better signage to entrance.
Cabin clean and tidy and a/c was on which was a pleasant surprise.
Nice clean well presented room thoughtful staff respectful bookings thanks you and hopefully I'll stay there on r,n,r

I tried to find opening hours on the website and wasn't successful. One booking website suggested they take check-ins to 8pm, but just on 7 they were closed. Need a big note on the door if this is unusual, or even something with the real hours clearly somewhere so I wouldn't have tried and been disappointed, I actually was after a place to park the car, sleep inside and have a shower in the morning. Easy money. I found a freebie shower further south.

Expérience décevante dans ce camping. Les douches et la cuisine étaient vraiment sales, et on nous a attribué un emplacement juste à côté de la cuisine. Au départ, cela semblait pratique, mais notre enthousiasme a rapidement disparu. Entre les pleurs de quatre enfants à 21h et à nouveau dès 5h du matin, il était difficile de trouver le calme. Malgré de nombreux campings parcourus en Australie, y compris des free camps et des sites près des autoroutes, c’est ici que nous avons eu le plus de mal à dormir. La poubelle débordait de vers, et l’état de la cuisine laissait franchement à désirer. Lorsque j’ai suggéré à l’accueil d’éviter d’installer des campeurs si près de la cuisine s’il y a d’autres emplacements libres, elle s’est excusée.

Nice little park, slides were fun and amenities were clean. The biggest pain in the ass was trying to leave to get into town. 5 minute detour to just go the direction you’re going

Not the parks fault but still super annoying

Our Car broke down 40 minutes out of Townsville and had to get towed back to this amazing and big caravan park, Evelyn and the staff have just been wonderful fitting us in and understanding our situation.  Wonderful swimming pools, great area for kids to play, amenities block kept very clean and cabins as well. Shopping centre across the road. Would like to say thankyou once again to Discovery parks. 👍👍😃👌

A colleague and I rolled in for 5 nights, each having a cabin. We were tired from working a 12-hour day but attempted to settle in and get some rest for the early start the following morning.  Unfortunately, in my unit, the TV wasn't working, nor was the AC in the bedroom. As a result, I reached reception after hours and was a fellow (first week on the job) turned up fairly promptly and was unable to fix the issues. He was able to move me a short time later to the cabin next door, making sure the AC and TV were functioning. This fellow was very apologetic and polite at all times. I feel the accommodation is needing some TLC to bring it back to life. The vanity globe was also missing. The hand rail leading up to stairs quite fragile.
Needs more maintenance and a freshen up!
Beautiful people that couldn’t help more,so clean and lots to do,water park and pool were great
Good Place
We had a great site near the water park, quite noisy at night cause people tended to party at the bbq there. Amenities were ok, quite dated.
Nice park

I can believe how slack their customer service is so slack . I tried to contact them after booking a cabin. I wanted to upgrade and ensure that we have ground floor accommodation. I left messages because they couldn't answer at the moment ( this was at about 3.00pm). The next day, after we left, I received my return call and told them how disappointed I was with them ( yes, I did give them a earful) though apologising, they were offended that I was so upset. I couldn't believe there attitude by not being available to answer my message during what I consider working hours. I had to make the point that they are very rude and unprofessional in not returning my call. As I mentioned to the lady that phoned me back afterwards that they don't  have to blacklist me because I have black listed them. Good luck to Discovery Park if this is how you treat customers and your take on customer service.
Nice park with large pool and water park slides. Quite a number of ensuite sites. 4c a litre off fuel next door for caravaners.
Very good park. Especially for children/families. Bathrooms could be a bit better.
The exit gate was locked when we went for tea at 7.30pm.  it was stressful trying to get out when most roads are one way

Stayed 7 nights in motel unit  bed was good. Rooms serviced only after 7days .small cockroaches running around. Toilet didn't flush a lot of the time after 3complaints.it wasn't like it was cheap either would not stay again Garry weller stay from 16 to 23 August 2024
Close to shops , on the crossroads to Ayr and Charters towers

We arrived Tuesday to stay in one of their “new” cabins. When first walking into this new cabin I immediately noticed how disgusting the walls were & that the cot we had requested wasn’t provided (was rectified though) but I had to clean a lot of spots on the walls before we could bring our stuff in. Then I noticed everything was dirty. The skirting boards, the floor, everything had hair & dust on it. The tap was broken & not secured. The blind in the main bedroom was missing its pull chain so we couldn’t open or close it. Underneath the couch was filthy with other people’s rubbish under it. The fridge wasn’t clean & contained bits of mould. The shower was what shocked me the most though! The mould, grime & green/yellow much was foul! Every time water hit it little pieces would break off into the shower water which was gross! This was all built up around the bottom of the shower frame along with dirty tiling in the shower & some form of animal poo on the window sills. The carpets are stained & very clearly dirty. Cushions on the couch had stains on them. There is a wall shelf under the tv which is very unstable so for children it’s dangerous as it’s at their height, actually lower & not safe. The little toilet room floor was very dirty behind the toilet bowl & the toilet bowl itself was filthy! There were ants when we arrived so I bug sprayed but they were back the next day & we hadn’t left any food out! The handle in the bathroom to wind the window out was shattered. There is absolutely no privacy or protection from the morning sun. It’s on an extremely busy main road so very loud at all times. There was also road works going on the entire time we were there. The little blue slide in the kids pool area bruised my kids something bad because of it’s poor design, risen parts that hit you & how steep it is also is quite dangerous in that depth of water. Both my children played at the water park the first 2 days & then got sick with Gastro - they had not left the park the entire time. The design of the pebbled pool makes for very easy stubbing of toes & ripping of skin. The signal out there is terrible & the parks wifi doesn’t even allow you to use Netflix ect even though they are smart TV’s. We did like the HDMI inputs in the wall! There are sliding doors in the bedrooms but no mirrored ones which you would certainly expect for the price. We paid $781 for 3 nights during the week. We certainly won’t be staying again for the simple fact even their new cabins are in terrible shape maintenance wise & cleanliness wise & the price just cannot be justified. I am a Google Guide & stay many many places - it’s not often I say “we won’t be back” & can’t find at least 3 positives but unfortunately this is one of those times. The reception ladies were lovely, I will say that! Upon arrival we were told several times to make sure we do not leave anything outside & to make sure we lock our doors… so I’d say crime is also an issue as we have only heard this once before - in Halls Creek, WA. Yes all places advise you to do those things anyway but this was stressed to us so one can only assume crime is bad.

I had a very poor nights sleep because of all the road noise outside. There was no way to get any natural airflow into the room and it smelt musty and damp. The room was very old but it was at least clean to a degree.

Do not stay here if you can book elsewhere stay elsewhere. Made a booking and the lady understood we were working in the area and may not stay the entire time our rooms were booked this was ok with the lady. Gave card details and first night was taken as deposit. Lady advised the rest would be taken out on departure. After first night the entire amount was taken out of my account without my permission. They were contacted and we were advised we would be refunded. My workmate rang and spoke with a different lady who advised no refund will be given only a credit. Scam straight up. I rang this lady and advised of the condition we made the booking and she told me that policies had changed but we were never told when we made booking. I than ask why she had withdrawn the money out of our accounts whilst we had not even left we were advised that money would be taken out on departure. She then became not interested in talking accusing me of abusing her and hung up. I had the conversation on load speaking so my co workers could hear. She then reported me for abusing her to my boss which has caused me to have no further employment with this company because of her lies.
My advise is to stay away from this park while this person is in charge of accounts. The room they provided had not been cleaned the bed had been slept in and not changed since the last person was in it the rubbish was piled up in the bin under the sink and the room smelt of urine I'd say someone had been urinating in the kitchen sink cause the toilet was a distance away. Room was disgusting. Pay a little extra and stay elsewhere.

Great place to stay.
Has different types of accommodation like standard motel, caravan spots, camping sites and cabins.
Has a pool area suitable for all aged kids.
Close to a major shopping centre and servo next door.

Absolutely great service especially Kelly front desk thank you for shuffling and fitting our 37ft in.
Managers are great to talk too make you feel welcomed.
Clean very quiet park. Not much lighting.
Great swimming area pool and slides, playground for little ones and small jumping pillow kids say bit hard..
We would definitely stay again.
Close to great pizza and Chinese behind park close to Fairfield shopping center.
Thank you all.
Road Noise but a clean park

We stayed in a 'motel room'. Thankfully, just for one night. Even in a standard room a toaster is usually provided, but no. One of the teaspoons with the mugs was dirty, with the leftovers with what I imagine was yoghurt. The bed side tables were thick with dirt, which I cleaned. We went to the 'camp kitchen' to use the microwave. This is the poorest version of a camp kitchen I have seen in my 6 years of travel. Overall a let down.

Park was ok, a lot of broken laundry machines.
The jumping pillow was good but so close to smokers.
The ensuite was the best thing ever.
There were lots residents not following basic rules or etiquette, parking on grass and shining high beam headlights, speeding.
Admin was problematic to deal with, in fact, will be looking for elsewhere to book because of admin staff.

One or two issues, like light globes etc (we stayed in a cabin) but otherwise  was a great place to stay.
DP Team, please leave the laundry open later!!!!!!

Buen camping para disfrutar con pareja, familia y/o amigos.

El camping cuenta con una piscina, varios lugares para que los niños jueguen, baños y una zona de lavandería.

El personal es muy atento y el ambiente es relajado. Por la noche hay mucho silencio y te permite descansar muy bien.

Se encuentra a 15 minutos en coche de Townsville City y a 500 metros del centro comercial de Fairfield Central, donde podrás encontrar diferentes restaurantes, un Coles y un Kmart, entre otras opciones.

Lo recomiendo al 100%!
I can't fault this place. I am usually extremely fussy but this place was great. Cabin number 4, large and airy, bright and clean. I would stay here again and again. No complaints here.

In this campsite, every aspect seems to be a nightmarish experience. As soon as you arrive, you are greeted by a remarkably unpleasant staff, whose bad mood is almost palpable. Sanitary facilities are a real playground for horror lovers, with hygienic conditions so deplorable that they defy all logic. Every morning, it is a challenge to navigate these toilets, and the smell that emerges from them seems to want to push you even further.

But that's not all. At night, your vehicle may be the target of vandalism, because there seems to be one chance in 2 that disreputable individuals have fun damaging it. If it is not your car that is mistreated, it is the external intruders who enter the campsite as if they were at home, thus disturbing the little tranquility that could remain.

And as if that were not enough, the regular presence of the police in the campsite to settle conflicts between campers testifies to the tense climate that reigns permanently. In short, avoid this place at all costs, unless you are looking for a holiday experience worthy of a horror movie, where hostility, insalubrity and danger seem to be the key words.
They say there dogfriendly but there not really not friendly staff toilets are not clean also tapes and n toilets don’t work and flies are full on not a very friendly park
Good stopover. Reasonable cost. Handy to find from Bruce hwy

We had an extended stay at this park to catch up on laundry and recharge |We had a nice grassy site with some shade|The amenities were top class and very clean |Good laundry as well |The park has an excellent pool plus a water slide area, and a separate play area for the kids|Friday and Saturday nights are pizza nights so no need to go out

Easy access as you approach Townsville. Welcoming, friendly staff - Kelly is a real Gem👌.

Generous site for Caravan, concrete slab adjacent, with ample parking space for motor vehicle too.

Wifi is ordinary, you have to go to a hotspot to connect 🤔.

We enjoyed our stay👍.
Very good sleep and rooms and excellent pool for kids
We used our van. The emenities always clean,  the pool area well set out & the management put on free promotions as well

Discovery Parks Townsville was absolutely amazing, we booked 2 nights in 2 separate cabins as to accommodate our big family and last minute we were upgraded to a deluxe cabin.... amazing, the staff were super friendly, the cabin was clean and made up very well with all supplies for the weekend  I.e toilet paper, rubbish bin bags, additional towels and extra shower mats, ( 3 women = alot of water usage) 😆 we went down for the pink concert and the reception desk had a handy location print out with directions and useful landmarks. The amenities were 2nd to none and kids made extra use of the pools, slides, playgrounds and jumping pillow.

Thanks Discovery Parks Townsville.

You've made our stay memorable ♥️
The park was very clean,the amenities were the best I've seen.will stay here again,the price was standard.we felt safe.well done
Clean and very tidy rooms enjoyed my stay. Staff were friendly and helpful

I cannot emphasize enough how impressed I was with the level of cleanliness and the overall management of Discovery Park. It's rare to find a place that consistently exceeds expectations, but Discovery Park did just that. I couldn't fault the place if I tried.

If you're looking for a clean, well-run accommodation with good service, look no further than Discovery Park. I highly recommend it to anyone seeking a hassle-free stay.

Service:
Wie in allen Discovery Parks sehr freundlicher und hilfsbereiter Service.
5/5*

Parkanlage:
Die Grünflächen, Pflanzen und Pools sind zwar sehr schön und gepflegte, allerdings sollte man die Küche und BBQ Stationen mal erneuern…
Diese sind in keinem sehr guten Zustand
3/5*

Preis:
Wir waren dort für zwei Nächte auf einer Powered Site mit Bad für nur ~120$, was ich sehr preiswert fand.
5/5*

Fazit:
Für einige wenige Nächte oder als kurzen Zwischenstopp auf einer längeren Reise/Fahrt gut zu empfehlen, aber für mehr als drei Übernachtungen währe es nicht so mein Fall.
4/5*

Great place for the kids , friendly staff only downside is the crime here we had someone try break into our cabin on two occasions on the 5 nights we stayed and the cabin beside us got robbed of a electric scooter and bike. You can’t leave nothing out nothing unlocked its very stressful. They said they are getting a security guard which is good but would be better sooner or later so these thieves stay away.
This place is busy, but relatively clean.Some of the staff seemed a bit gruff, but any issues were handled efficiently.

Such a well maintained park. The cabins were perfect and clean and the staff so friendly and helpful. The water park was amazing and kept the kids busy. Loved the daily activities, face painting, coffee truck and icy poles. We will definitely be back!!

The room was very clean. We stayed in the motel accommodation, there's undercover parking available. The Mobile phone reception wasn't great, with one bar available on 5g . The WiFi that the park offered does not work in the room. The actual caravan park and cabins look amazing. With BBQ, splash pool and laundry facilities available. The staff were very friendly and helpful 🙂 . Fairfield shopping centre is 600 metres across the highway. The Ampol service station is located next door.  There is an early morning coffee van that sells breakfast that sets up outside the office.
Lovely place our unit had an ant problem..
Nothing was a problem to the staff, all were very friendly and accommodating.
Should have security cameras in public areas, or something missing or broken we cannot find problems.

What a great park! Newly renovated amenities as well as the older block next door so you'll never have to wait to use them. Laundry has plenty of machines. Awesome, large pool, water park with water slides, play ground and jumping pillow. Modest camp kitchen with working appliances. Friendly staff at reception and around the site. Some obvious road noise from the highway but we never once felt unsafe here. There's a few different sections of camp sites - we had enough room between campers, concrete pad, and green grass. Nice hardens and trees around. Kmart, Coles etc a few kms down the road.
Very friendly
Great location  friendly staff  awesome pool  Great waterpark  clean amenities  great caravan sites with slabs

Excellent family stay park right on the north side of Townsville with easy access to nearby shopping centre with Coles and Woolworths. 20 mins to the city centre and the Strand. Cabin was clean and tidy all park facilities were excellent. Definitely recommend for a stay with the kids, its even pet friendly!

I’ve stayed here twice now, once in a room and once on a site. The room was good, lacked a bathroom but close to the toilet block but had all the stuff I needed to cook. Second trip was less then ideal on a powered site. I would often come back to camp to find other campers using my power leads and at one stage my spot. Better signage to what is allocated to what camp would have reduced this (hopefully). Also with the site I’m in being back to back with another site and no clear boundaries other campers would come and take up majority of the site making it hard to park or connect to the water to refill my tanks.

Very good atmosphere
Good facilities
Very good swimming facilities
Enjoyed staying there and location was great.
Very noisy area with workers coming and going at all hours.
Had issues with trouble overnight, so we didn't stay.

We stayed here a totally of 3 times during our travels.
Definitely have to book a caravan site during the dry season. We did have to go an ensuite site a couple of times as that was all that was available at short notice. Office staff did look after us.
Great park for the kids with great pool & waterslides to cool off in. Jumping pillow & playground.
Ensuite sites could do with a major make over.
Friendly staff, happy for a chat

We had a single cabin, no bathroom. It was very average. The fan had one speed, cyclonic, and the screen door was not key lockable so the chance of being broken into while we were out was quite high. Young criminals are using multi grips to easily break through solid doors so the extra security of lockable screen doors is very important to protect guests belongings. We were told that two guests had their cars stolen the week before so this clearly made us wish we had a lockable screen door. Also warned that the area was really bad upon arrival by other guests. Female communal bathrooms were really nice and obviously recently renovated.

Motel accommodation. I had to go to the Woolies & grab drain cleaner to clear our shower that acted like a foot-bath. That was after no less than three requests for maintenance to the front desk.

It also took several reminders each week, across three weeks to get fresh towels and bedding.

Near the end it was determined, reduced was the standard. Funny they had not mentioned that the ten or so times we requested the room be serviced...

I had booked a cabin for Friday night ( 28/7) and was absolutely appalled by what transpired! My under 3 year old found a used baggie in our cabin! Imagine if she had opened it and ingested the contents!!! I went to reception first thing in the morning as it was closed for the night by the time my daughter found it. I showed the contents to by what looked like a maintenance man as the manager hadn't arrived yet. I was REASSURED that the manager would call. It is now the 1/8 and I still have yet to receive a call from the manager personally to apologise.  I will NEVER stay with them again as they clearly do not care about customers and young children's safety. You should be ASHAMED  of yourself.
classy Park would recomend
Could improve with a makeover. I visit this park almost ever year and their Ensuites for caravan sires are still the same ones they had in the 80's. Same mouldy tiles...otherwise great park. 👍

We stayed at Motel room 10. What a disaster.  Cockroaches in the beds and kitchen … everywhere. When I took this information to the site management they just shrugged it off and gave us another can of spray.  The beds are not sleepable. They are shot - banana bed!!! Time for a major revamp or shut down. Best skip this roach infested misery.
Great clean park great  large  site’s amenities very clean
Clean amenities, easily accessible, friendly staff and unpowered sites were some of the best I’ve had for a caravan park.
Awesome place for families!

Good park for couple of days ,not up to Big 4 standard of old but ok.
Amenities good
